prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The National Security Act 2023 is a piece of legislation that primarily pertains to England and Wales. It does not apply to Scotland, which has its own legal framework and procedures for search warrants and investigations that differ from the provisions outlined in this Act.
